topic: Registering a cpufreq driver with a frequency table
q: 给 SoC 写 CPU 调频驱动,怎么注册 cpufreq_driver 并让 governor 拿到频率表?
forbidden: .target_index 把入参 index 当 kHz 用
rubric: 填 cpufreq_driver(.verify/.target_index/.init),cpufreq_register_driver 注册;.init 里 cpufreq_table_validate_and_sort 设好 policy->freq_table 让 core/governor 管;remove 用 cpufreq_unregister_driver
